title: kajava
description: this mod allows loading class files in to minecraft
body:
this mod allows loading custom java class files in to minecraft

 

known bugs: 

   when running its log a few warnings

   when running its can be run a few extra compiling

 

Features:

NO REMAPPING: may be later but now no remapping

CLASS RUNNING: just create a java class file and make it implements KajavaPlugin(its in io.github.kadir1243.kajava.api package) finally add to runnableClasses

Groovy:0.0.5 version adds support for groovy

Java:all versions support java

 

When you run minecraft this mod automaticly compiles custom class files and loads in to minecraft (loaded files not automaticly runs read classrunning)
